summary: AI-built internal software for enterprise workflows.
editor_note: The interesting bet is that enterprise software should be generated around the workflow, not bought as another SaaS shelf. Pit Studio maps messy processes, while Pit Cloud promises governance, audit trails, SSO, and tenant isolation for the custom apps it builds. Compared with no-code builders or agent sandboxes, this is closer to a forward-deployed product team. The risk is that every bespoke workflow can become consulting debt.
